case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ARLENE B NOVICK

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NOVICK, ARLENE B SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-11-2017

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVICK, ARLENE B $3,324.54 PRINCIPAL, $282.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,607.04, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100010872), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED FEB-13-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-14-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT NOVICK, ARLENE B
